steps.title: Distribute and combine like terms
steps.content: Distribute $6xy$ to each term inside the parentheses:$$6xy\cdot 2x^2=12x^3y\quad\text{and}\quad 6xy\cdot 5y=30xy^2$$So the result has the form $\#x^3y+30xy^2$.

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content: Among the choices, only one ends in $30xy^2$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
